analytics.last_inbound_snippet: Subject: Zoca X Nabi Beauty\n\nBody: Hi Sugene, I’m Tanvi, your Growth Manager, and I wanted to personally reach out now that I’ve received your account today. It was great connecting with you earlier, and I’m truly exci…

messages.body: Thank you for calling Navi Studio. Nobody is available to take your call, but if you leave a message, we will get back to you or shoot us a text and we'll text you right back. Thank you. Hi Suji, this is Chintan from Zok…
Thank uou
Hi Sugene, I apologise for the delay
I still do not see a refund for $150
Please find the screenshot attached
It is for the $150. For ads. Not the 199 for Zoca. Thanks.
Hey Sugene, I have requested refund invoice from finance team -sharing shortly
Hi i have not for the refund for the ads only zoca.
Request Closed
Like this?
I can schedule a call with the manager?
And this
Can you address the other things i said in this thread?
While you’re here, can you answer this, please?
The payment for November is for the discovery agent until December 24. Canceling my subscription now means you are charging me for no reason
It says that my subscription will be canceled within 24 hours in the email not for December
Hi Sugene, your subsection is cancelled in December.
Yes it is with the manager
Can I set up a phone call or video meeting with the manager?
Hi Sugene, we have refunded the ads fee to you. The processing might take 3-5 working days to get reverted
If you prefer us to set up a phone call or meeting, we can do that too. If there’s any confusion about what I’m saying.
And this
*my
I also got an email saying within 24 hours, i will no longer be using zoca. I assume my subscription is terminated. So i should receive a refund for that as well right?
Can I get that direct line to management please?
We can share the screenshot of refund with you in 24 hours
It doesn’t make sense that my subscription be canceled now if you’re telling me that it’s active till December
Also, the agreement that I signed that I can’t find
Hi Sugene, I have myself forwarded this particular query to Finance team. Please allow me sometime to get back on this
I am meeting on Thursday was canceled without my knowledge and then I got the email about my subscription being deactivated within 24 hours
Sure, what time can we connect tomorrow?
So please refund the 199
Is there a reason i am not getting any response?
Please allow me sometime and I will quickly share the 150$ refund invoice to you
Ok thanks
Request Closed
I got an email saying that my ￼meeting on Thursday was canceled from your end. Does that mean my subscription is canceled as well?
Can you confirm i will get a refund for both?
Hi, so the 199 for zoca cleared.
How can I find the agreement
I need a few things. I need you to immediately refund the 150 for ads.  I need to see the agreement I signed (but have no access to) And i would like a direct contact with management
I don’t see it in my email
Where can i find that agreement? I lookes in my email and did not see it
I was charged for ads
Hi Sugene, we have a due of discovery agent subscription value for the month of November - the 199$ monthly charge.
Can you also show me your conversation with management?
And i dont believe you even cancelled ads.
So please just cancel effective immediately

Did you talk with managemnt? You specifically told me I wasn’t going to get charged for ads and I did. Please refund this  Nobody told me that there was a 15 day cancellation policy for Discover agent

As we have already charged you 150$ you only owe us 49$.   We can go ahead in two ways - 1. You can clear the 199$ invoice and we can refund you 150$ that we have deducted on 24th immediately   2. You can pay another inv…
Please refund this
Hi Sugene, I hope you are well. I can confirm to you that your ads are cancelled and hence we are happy to refund the 150$ once you clear the discovery charge for November
I was honestly going to just take a break and reevaluate things on my end and come back. But this whole situation is making me rethink that.
Also, can you tell me why i was charged for ads when you told me more than 3 times i would not be.  Im having a hard time trusting that anything will be canceled or refunded.
This is Zoca support which is taken care by management

Hi Sugene, I understand your frustration about the ads charge, and I want to assure you that your subscription is set to be canceled on December 1st. Once you clear the $200 for the discovery charge, we will promptly pro…
We have certain protocols in place and this is also something that is mentioned on the service agreement you have signed on Jun 26th. Please let me know if there's anything else we can help you with.
Ok. I have a pending charge of $150. As long as it does not clear thats fine. But also with the discovery agent, please request management. Thanks!
You won't be charged for ads

Hi Sugene, as the invoice was already generated and the RA campaign was also shared with the relevant team - I don't think we can do anything about the charge for November but let me still go ahead and request management…
Well we specifically scheduled the meeting on the 20th because we knew that the charge would happen on the 25th. So if I decided to stop the ad manager, I would not get charged on the 25th.
We haven't charged you for the ads Sugene - it's for the discovery agent
But I still did
I will get back to you. Thank you for your patience.
I was told that the google manager was cancelled. Why am i charged $150
Thank you for calling Mavi Studio. Nobody is available to take your call, but if you leave a message, we will get back to you, or shoot us a text and we'll text you right back. Thank you.
Hi Sugene, we can't hold off the November charged given we need a 15 days notice for cancellation but rest assured, November will be the last month charged.
Your subsection is already aligned for cancellation
Request Closed
Hi, i just want to make sure that I will not be charged on the 25th
I was not aware of that. I was told i can cancel any time when i signed on.
But if you still decide to cancel - please let me know and we will make sure  November is the last month charged.
We have shared the request with management
Oh sorry. I downloaded the wrong one. I will send over the right one
Incase your dissatisfaction is majorly about the ads agent - I just wanted to let you know that we have gone ahead and cancelled it
I wasn't able to find the contact number and email ID for the clients in the data. Could you please share that information with me when you have a moment?
But here is the last of my appointments as well
I would like my subscription to end before the next payment date
Can you please share the mail id and contact number of the clients for the review automation?

Hi! So I need to take a break on Zoca. I would like to stop my subscription.  I will likely come back in a month or so after I decide.   I have a quick question, must I use zoca as my google website? Or can I use my own …
I am assessing a few different things on my end and weighing out options. I will definitely reach back out if I decide to start again.
No issues. Thanks for sharing
Hi Sugene, Asmita here!  I hope you are doing well. Lately , we have been getting of traffic from local SEO (the discovery agent). At this point, stopping is not something I would suggest
Can you cancel so I do not get charged November?
Thank you for calling Mavis Studio. Nobody is available to take your call.
Can you please share the list of the clients as well for review automation?
Hi Sugene! I've blocked your calendar for 9 AM on December 4th and I'm looking forward to our conversation. If you have any questions or need anything in the meantime, feel free to reach out!
Meeting Link: meet.google.com/evh-awhb-rnp

Ok we can do 9am :)
